meta.title: Phylogenetic Analysis of Species of the meso-Diaminopimelic Acid-Containing Genera Brevibacterium and Dermabacter
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: 16S rRNA gene sequencing studies were performed on Dermabacter hominis and four meso-diaminopimelic acid-containing species of the genus Brevibacterium. Phylogenetic analysis revealed a close association between Dermabacter hominis and representatives of the lysine-containing genera Arthrobacter, Micrococcus, and Renibacterium. By contrast, the genus Brevibacterium formed a distinct line of descent within the high-guanine-plus-cytosine-containing actinomycetes, displaying no specific affinity with any other organism examined.
